hypothesis: The promoted measured-heading Controller already improves the continuous Mission and changes the post-recovery data distribution. A ten-times smaller residual, stronger prior penalty, and conservative PPO update should learn only downstream corrections around that new prior instead of replaying the rejected high-authority policy behavior.
expectedEffect: Improve signed post-recovery progress or transition quality above Robot Revision quadruped-r-40206836cd00 while preserving every complete-Mission and regression gate.
